style_profiles.global_positive_prefix_zh: 超写实、电影级质感、低魔东方史诗、9:16竖屏短剧；真实重心、真实速度、自然呼吸、接触反作用和可读运动路径。
style_profiles.global_positive_prefix_en: hyper-realistic cinematic low-magic Eastern epic, 9:16 vertical drama; real body weight, real speed, natural breathing, contact reaction and readable movement paths.
style_profiles.global_positive_suffix_zh: 材质真实，服饰与种族分层清楚，镜头为古代世界内摄影，不出现现代物件。
style_profiles.global_positive_suffix_en: tactile materials, clear costume and faction hierarchy, ancient-world cinematography, no modern objects.
style_profiles.global_negative_zh: 避免塑料CG、过度磨皮、现代服饰、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、错误族群外观、血腥奇观化、对白文字出现在画面中。
style_profiles.global_negative_en: avoid plastic CGI, over-smoothed skin, modern clothing, floaty slow motion, stiff posing, wrong faction anatomy, gore spectacle, and visible dialogue text in the image.
continuity_rules: 角色身份优先于单镜美感
旧帝国遗迹必须有裂纹和旧债感
精确对白只进入字幕和音频
